name: A-2
events: 20 Jun 1943 A-2 fires two torpedoes at the German barge F 307 off the Crimea in position 44°53'N, 35°57'E. The target is however not hit.
23 Jun 1943 A-2 fires (a) torpedo(es) at the German barge F 471 off Cape Chauda, Crimea. The target is however not hit.
16 Sep 1943 A-2 fires 2 torpedoes at the German barge F 369 some 12 nautical miles south-west of Sudak, Crimea, Ukraine in position 44°46'N, 34°46'E. The target is however not hit.
10 Oct 1943 A-2 torpedoed and sank the German barge F 474 (155 GRT) off Yalta, Crimea in position 44°28'N, 34°13'E.
